active_milestone: Phase R82 first PRD-backed uncovered clause implemented and tested
active_invariant: ez-ax runtime graph contains no LLM inference. ez-ax remains orchestration-centric. The execution backend is PyAutoGUI (OS-level coordinate click). Browser-internal tools (Playwright, CDP) are forbidden as execution backend. The released ceiling is runCompletion with all 12 missions released. Canonical continuation memory remains two-tiered: work-rag for current state, rag for durable lessons. OpenClaw is the external caller; ez-ax owns the CUA engine (PyAutoGUI).
heuristic_family_ladder: same module exact PRD-backed clause gap
seeded_slice_requirements: each family changes source AND corresponding tests together to keep validation green
update current-state and work-rag in the same task close
update the active coverage ledger in the same task close
final_stop_requirements: canonical current state does not name a concrete next slice
released-path E2E evidence remains typed and comparable at runCompletion
all 12 missions execute in sequence and stop proof is at run_completion
